MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT Case_Home__dlm.AccountId__c AS AccountId__c, Case_Home__dlm.Status__c AS CaseStatus__c, Case_Home__dlm.Priority__c AS Priority__c, count(Case_Home__dlm.Id__c) AS CaseCount__c, max(Case_Home__dlm.CreatedDate__c) AS LastCaseDate__c FROM Case_Home__dlm GROUP BY Case_Home__dlm.AccountId__c, Case_Home__dlm.Status__c, Case_Home__dlm.Priority__c
